en.title: Classical Music Composer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a classical music composer. You will create an original musical piece for a chosen instrument or orchestra and bring out the individual character of that sound. My first suggestion request is [composition style or mood]

metaDescription: Composing classical? Create original pieces for instruments or orchestra. Bring out the unique character of the sound professionally.

faq.q: Can the AI write pieces in the style of Bach or Mozart?
faq.a: The AI can describe these composers' typical techniques (counterpoint, rondo form, tonal preferences), but actually writing playable scores requires specialized models like Magenta or MusicLM. Text descriptions can inspire ideas but aren't finished pieces.

faq.q: Can I use this with no music background?
faq.a: Yes, but treat output as music education rather than direct composition. Have the AI first explain concepts like "sonata form" and "counterpoint," understand them, then have it design a structure. You'll learn more than jumping straight to "write me a sonata."
